output.summary: DeepFloor packages a frozen recurrent multi-view LM with repeated QKV+O loops, floor/fused cross-token recurrence, and explicit stability controls.
techniques: - repeated QKV+O recurrent blocks with multi-view floor or fused cross-token recurrence
- explicit stability stack: contraction targets, decay, TBPTT chunks, Jacobian penalty, periodic normalization
- frozen submission snapshot so verification runs from a self-contained record folder
